mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM scene WHERE deleted = 0
AND scene_name LIKE '%' || #{sceneName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM scene WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scene (scene_name, positioning, image_url, description, status, create_user_id) VALUES (#{sceneName}, #{positioning}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE scene SET scene_name = #{sceneName}, positioning = #{positioning}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE scene SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
